en.title: Optimization Geometrodynamics: Variational Reduction and Interaction Curvature
en.short: A variational account of hidden optimizer geometry, with exact reduction and certified computation on affine-invariant SPD geometry.
en.abstract: Adaptive optimizers carry hidden states that shape how visible gradients become parameter motion. This paper develops a variational theory for that hidden geometry: infimal pushforward removes hidden states that realize the same action, while the affine-invariant SPD action map admits a global analytic bundle, a unique nearest-controller section, and a globally convergent solver with posterior certificates.

zh.title: 优化几何动力学：变分约化与交互曲率
zh.short: 从变分角度刻画优化器的隐状态几何，并在仿射不变 SPD 几何上给出精确约化与可认证计算。
zh.abstract: 自适应优化器的隐状态决定了可见梯度如何转化为参数运动。本文为这种隐几何建立变分理论：下确界推送消去实现相同行为的隐状态；仿射不变 SPD 作用映射具有全局解析丛、唯一的最近控制器截面，以及带后验认证的全局收敛求解器。
